basics.name: Babu Honakhande
basics.title: B.E. Student in AI & Machine Learning
basics.summary: Enthusiastic student with a growing interest in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. Familiar with Python, basic machine learning concepts, and data analysis. Passionate about building intelligent solutions and improving technical skills through hands-on projects. Strong foundation in programming and problem solving. Skilled in Python, C/C++, and basic web development. Eager to apply technical knowledge to real-world projects and continuously learn new technologies.

experience.location: Jain College of Engineering and Research
bullets: Currently pursuing studies in AIML, actively participating in team collaborations.
Participated in hackathons to gain practical hands-on problem-solving and coding experience.
Developed team-based projects focused on building practical technical solutions.

projects.title: JCER Smart Assistant
bullets: Built a multilingual (English, Hindi, Kannada) interactive smart assistant for Jain College of Engineering and Research.
Implemented real-time dynamic UI for multiple departments and faculty profiles, with speech synthesis functionality.
Deployed the responsive full-stack application on Vercel ensuring optimal performance and mobile compatibility.

projects.title: Freelance Marketplace Platform
bullets: Developed a responsive front-end for a freelance marketplace connecting clients with global talent.
Implemented sections for job postings, freelancer portfolios, and project bidding workflows.
Optimized navigation and user experience to facilitate seamless project management.

education.institution: Jain College of Engineering and Research, Udyambag, Belgaum
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (BE) in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

certifications.title: Build Your Own Generative AI Model
